Re-adjudication Request for Claim Invoice 73119

Visit Date: 2026-01-03 00:00:00
Diagnosis: S82.31-Other fracture of lower end of tibia with fracture of fibula (any part),V01.1-Pedestrian injured in collision with pedal cycle, traffic accident,S82.6-Fracture of lateral malleolus,S82.2-Fractu

TARIFF ADJUSTMENT (7 line(s), total difference: 0.07 SAR):
  The rejected amounts represent rounding differences of 0.01 SAR per line item.
  Per the agreed tariff schedule between Hayat National Hospital-ABHA and
  Ministry of Health, these amounts are within the contractual tolerance.
  Request: Accept the claimed amounts as per the agreed tariff rates.

PACKAGE INCLUSION (2 line(s)):
  These services exceed the scope of the package and were provided as additional
  necessary care beyond the standard package components.
  Request: Approve as supplementary charges outside package scope.
